originalTitle: GE’s nugget ice maker is nearly half off if you buy it refurbished
summary: If you’re looking for ways to make staying cool and hydrated easier this summer, Woot is currently selling a refurbished GE Profile Opal 2.0 Ultra Nugget Ice Maker for $264.99 through June 3rd. That’s $184 less than buying new at its full price, and comes with a 90-day warranty. If you want a brand new […]
content: If you’re looking for ways to make staying cool and hydrated easier this summer, Woot is currently selling a refurbished GE Profile Opal 2.0 Ultra Nugget Ice Maker for $264.99 through June 3rd. That’s $184 less than buying new at its full price, and comes with a 90-day warranty. If you want a brand new model, it’s also on sale for $359 ($90) at Best Buy, or $449 ($50 off) with a side tank included (Amazon, Best Buy, GE). [Product: GE Profile Opal 2.0 Ultra | https://www.anrdoezrs.net/links/8836598/type/dlg/https://home.woot.com/offers/ge-profile-opal-2-0-ultra-nugget-ice-maker-with-scale-inhibiting-filter-2?ref=w_cnt_wp_0_8, https://bestbuy.7tiv.net/c/482924/614286/10014?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bestbuy.com%2Fproduct%2Fge-profile-opal-2-0-ultra-nugget-ice-maker-with-scale-inhibiting-filter-stone-white%2FJ7645SYKSR%2Fsku%2F6584624%3Futm_source%3Dfeed%26extStoreId%3D%26ref%3D212%26loc%3D19941088242%26gclsrc%3Daw.ds%26gad_source%3D1%26gad_campaignid%3D19948966303%26gbraid%3D0AAAAAD-ORIiDuFQZSC_WMk7nj3NGEPWAO%26gclid%3DCjwKCAjwidXQBhAZEiwA4egw6IeopDpXraHLD8AMe2H5nDD7tJV-e_hhmYzfkx7GuqU2KrYYka0q1BoCcVgQAvD_BwE, https://www.amazon.com/Profile-Opal-Ultra-Nugget-Maker/dp/B0FWLXJSGC?th=1&tag=theverge02-20] If you’re unfamiliar with nugget ice, it’s the soft, chewable ice that cools drinks quickly and  doesn’t melt as fast as crushed ice. In the week she spent testing it, my colleague Jennifer Pattison Tuohy said the countertop appliance quickly became her family’s “favorite kitchen gadget,” making drinks taste better and even encouraging her kids to stay hydrated. It’s simple to use and makes ice quickly, churning out up to 38 pounds of chewable nugget ice per day. Setup is relatively simple, too, as it doesn’t require plumbing. The machine also supports Wi-Fi, allowing you to schedule ice production or control it with Amazon Alexa or Google Assistant. While the ice maker does require a lot of maintenance, GE also added some upgrades aimed at making it slightly easier, including a scale-inhibiting water filter, a reusable air filter, and built-in alerts that let you know when it’s time to sanitize or descale. There’s also a touch display for checking status and connecting to Wi-Fi, along with a stainless steel scoop and a magnetic scoop holder. Read our GE Profile Opal 2.0 Ultra Nugget Ice Maker review.
chineseTitle: 如果您购买翻新的 GE 块冰机，可享受近一半的折扣
chineseSummary: 如果您正在寻找让今年夏天保持凉爽和补充水分的方法，Woot 目前正在销售翻新的 GE Profile Opal 2.0 Ultra Nugget 制冰机，截至 6 月 3 日，价格为 264.99 美元。这比以全价购买新品便宜 184 美元，并提供 90 天保修。如果你想要一个全新的[…]
chineseContent: 如果您正在寻找让今年夏天保持凉爽和补充水分的方法，Woot 目前正在销售翻新的 GE Profile Opal 2.0 Ultra Nugget 制冰机，截至 6 月 3 日，价格为 264.99 美元。这比以全价购买新品便宜 184 美元，并提供 90 天保修。如果您想要全新型号，百思买也以 359 美元（90 美元）的价格出售，或含侧水箱售价 449 美元（折扣 50 美元）（亚马逊、百思买、GE）。 [产品：GE Profile Opal 2.0 Ultra | https://www.anrdoezrs.net/links/8836598/type/dlg/https://home.woot.com/offers/ge-profile-opal-2-0-ultra-nugget-ice-maker-with-scale-inhibiting-filter-2?ref=w_cnt_wp_0_8， https://bestbuy.7tiv.net/c/482924/614286/10014?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bestbuy.com%2Fproduct%2Fge-profile-opal-2-0-ultra-nugg et-制冰机带水垢抑制过滤器石白%2FJ7645SYKSR%2Fsku%2F6584624%3Futm_source%3Dfeed%26extStoreId%3D%26参考%3D212%26loc%3D19941088242%26gclsrc%3Daw.ds%26gad_source%3D1%26gad_campaignid%3D19948966303%26gbraid%3D0AAAAD-ORIiDuF QZSC_WMk7nj3NGEPWAO%26gclid%3DCjwKCAjwidXQBhAZEiwA4egw6IeopDpXraHLD8AMe2H5nDD7tJV-e_hhmYzfkx7GuqU2KrYYka0q1BoCcVgQAvD_BwE, https://www.amazon.com/Profile-Opal-Ultra-Nugget-Maker/dp/B0FWLXJSGC?th=1&tag=theverge02-20] 如果您不熟悉块冰，那么它是一种柔软、可咀嚼的冰，可以快速冷却饮料，并且融化速度不像碎冰那么快。我的同事詹妮弗·帕蒂森·图伊 (Jennifer Pattison Tuohy) 表示，在她测试该设备的一周内，这款台面设备很快成为她家人“最喜欢的厨房小工具”，它使饮料味道更好，甚至鼓励她的孩子保持水分。它使用简单，制冰速度快，每天可生产多达 38 磅的咀嚼块冰。设置也相对简单，因为它不需要管道。该机还支持Wi-Fi，让您轻松上网
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
